# Test fixture: clean docs index

Links to an architecture page in the same tree: [architecture overview](architecture/overview.md).

Links out to a package doc: [foo package doc](../packages/foo/doc/foo.md).

Links to a directory that exists: [the packages directory](../packages).

An external link that must never be checked against disk: [external](https://example.com/not-a-real-path).

A mailto link that must never be checked: [contact](mailto:someone@example.com).

A same-page anchor with no file target: [see below](#a-heading).
